chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-421 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA 3435/24 07-04-2025 Mr. Atta Hussain Chandio, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Saeed Jamal Lund, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Muhammad Raza Burdi, Deputy P.G for the State. **** Counsel for applicant places on record certain documens through statement, taken on record. Heard counsel for applicant, respondent No.4 and DPG and perused the impugned order dated 29.07.2024, passed by ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Perusal of impugned order reflects that there is documentary evidence which needs to be investigated. Under the circumstances, no illegality or irregularity is found in the impugned order requiring interference of this Court. Result thereof, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE Ahmad
